text: Code refactoring: Split ui.ts mega-store (2547 lines)
description:
ui.ts is too large, split into focused stores:
- navigation.ts: Column/phase selection, keyboard nav
- modals.ts: Modal state management
- graph.ts: Graph view state
- settings.ts: Project settings, preferences

Benefits: Better maintainability, clearer boundaries, easier testing

status.comment: Continued modularization with focused architectural split: created dedicated Pinia graph store `stores/ui/graph-store.ts` for graph selection/color/panel/labels state + actions, and rewired `useUIStore` to delegate via typed compatibility facade getters/actions. Also removed legacy one-line tree/path wrapper methods from `ui.ts` and switched action modules to shared helpers directly (`selection-actions.ts`, `move-actions.ts`). `ui.ts` reduced to 576 LOC. Verification: `npm run type-check -w frontend` ✅ and `npm run test:unit -w frontend` ✅ (16 files, 65 tests).
